summary: Add quota burn subcommand under quota that fits a linear trend over quota_snapshots and projects exhaustion vs refresh_day_of_month. Caps hoursUntilZero at 8760 (1 year) to avoid +Inf overflowing time.Time.
reason: Single-call /quota cannot project burn rate. quota burn auto-captures a fresh snapshot on each call (unless --no-fetch); over time the projection sharpens. Annotations correctly omit mcp:read-only because of the auto-capture write.
validated_outcome: First call: warming-up with 1 snapshot. After 2+ snapshots: returns burn_rate_per_hour and projected_exhaustion ISO timestamp; status flips to WARNING when projected_exhaustion is before next_refresh.
